name: Sales Insight Automator
description: AI-powered backend service for processing sales data and generating executive summaries

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && source venv/Scripts/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:frontend: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'Linting skipped'
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && pylint main.py --disable=all --enable=syntax-error 2>/dev/null || echo 'Linting skipped'
scripts.docker:build: docker build -t sales-automator-backend:latest ./backend && docker build -t sales-automator-frontend:latest ./frontend

author: Rabbitt AI Team
